name: Text Generation WebUI
one_liner: Gradio-based web interface for running LLMs locally with extensive model and training support.
description: Text Generation WebUI (oobabooga) is a Gradio web interface for managing and interacting with local LLMs. Supports multiple model loaders (Transformers, llama.cpp, ExLlama, AutoGPTQ), training modes (LoRA, QLoRA), and extensions for character personas, RAG, and more.
